# Roofing Rehab

Company: Roofing Rehab
Website: https://roofing-rehab.com
Phone: 208-818-0482
Email: roofingrehab@gmail.com
Address: 2139 E Avon Circle, Hayden, ID 83835
Owners: Dante Hardin and Michael Hardin

## Services
- Residential re-roofs (tear-offs and shingle installation, IKO products)
- New construction roofing (single-family to commercial)
- Metal roofing (exposed fastener and standing seam systems)
- Roof additions (tying new roofing into existing structures)
- Commercial roofing (apartments, offices, large-scale developments)
- Siding installation (fiber cement, LP SmartSide)
- Seamless gutters and gutter guards
- Roof inspections (pre-listing, insurance claims, maintenance)
- Emergency roof repairs (storm damage, leaks)

## Service Areas
- Hayden, ID
- Coeur d'Alene, ID
- Post Falls, ID
- Rathdrum, ID
- Spokane, WA

## About
Roofing Rehab is a family-owned residential and commercial roofing company based in Hayden, Idaho, owned and operated by brothers Dante and Michael Hardin. Dante brings over 9 years of hands-on roofing industry experience; Michael focuses on client relations and project coordination. The company is licensed and insured, offers free no-obligation estimates on every project, and typically responds to emergency calls within 24 hours. Roofing Rehab's mission is built on honest, transparent pricing and lasting client relationships — no pressure, no upsells.
